_meta.dna: linkedin(suite) = connect(account) x analyze(profile) x post(content) x outreach(leads) x trend(daily)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor has 7 seed questions from a specific persona context. Questions must be answerable by checking if something actually works — click it, see it, verify it. Not theoretical.

name: Tower of LinkedIn Suite
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT(7q) -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_context: 37, San Francisco, Tech recruiter, Intermediate tech, Pro tier, LinkedIn is primary professional tool, needs seamless account linking
questions: Can I find the LinkedIn Suite app in the Solace Browser App Store and see it lists three modules: Outreach, Poster, and Profile Optimizer?
After clicking Install, does the app prompt me to log in to LinkedIn through the Solace Browser's built-in session?
Does the LinkedIn login use Solace Browser's session persistence so I do not need to re-enter credentials every session?
After logging in, does the app show my LinkedIn profile name, photo, and headline to confirm the right account is linked?
If LinkedIn shows a CAPTCHA or verification challenge during login, does the app surface it to me instead of silently failing?
Can I disconnect my LinkedIn account from the app and see the linked status update to 'Not Connected' immediately?
Does the app warn me that LinkedIn rate-limits automated actions and show my current daily action quota?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Derek relies on LinkedIn daily. Account linking must work through real browser sessions, handle CAPTCHAs, and show clear connection status. LinkedIn auth is session-based, not OAuth.

floors.persona_context: 26, Accra, Junior software engineer looking for remote jobs, Beginner tech, Free tier, wants to optimize LinkedIn profile for recruiter visibility
questions: Can I click 'Analyze Profile' and see a score breakdown for my headline, summary, experience, skills, and endorsements within 30 seconds?
Does the profile analysis tell me specific improvements like 'Add 3 more skills related to Python' rather than generic advice?
Can I see how my profile compares to top-performing profiles in the 'Software Engineer' category in my region?
Does the analysis detect that my headline says 'Student' and suggest changing it to something recruiter-friendly?
If my profile photo is missing, does the analysis flag it as a critical issue that reduces profile views by X%?
Can I click 'Apply Suggestion' on a recommended headline change and see the preview before it modifies my actual LinkedIn profile?
Does the analysis work on Free tier without requiring a paid LinkedIn Premium subscription?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Amara is early-career and non-technical. Profile analysis must give actionable, specific advice — not platitudes. Must work without LinkedIn Premium.

floors.persona_context: 44, New York, B2B Sales Director, Expert tech, Pro tier, posts thought leadership content 3x per week, needs scheduling and tone control
questions: Can I compose a LinkedIn post in the app's editor and see a live preview of how it will appear in the LinkedIn feed?
Does the post editor support formatting (bold, italic, bullet points, emojis) that matches LinkedIn's actual rendering?
Can I schedule a post for next Tuesday at 9am EST and see it in a calendar view of my scheduled posts?
If I paste a blog URL into the post, does the app generate a preview card with the correct title, image, and description?
Does the app offer tone suggestions (professional, casual, provocative) and show me how the same post reads in each tone?
Can I save a post as a draft and return to edit it in a later session without losing any formatting?
After a post is published, does the app show engagement metrics (likes, comments, reposts) within the app itself?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Rachel is an experienced LinkedIn power user. The posting flow must match or exceed native LinkedIn UX — preview accuracy, scheduling reliability, and engagement tracking are non-negotiable.

floors.persona_context: 39, Austin, Startup founder doing outbound sales, Intermediate tech, Pro tier, needs to send personalized connection requests to 50 leads per week
questions: Can I upload a CSV of 50 leads with LinkedIn URLs and have the app create personalized connection request messages for each?
Does each generated connection request include a specific detail from the lead's profile (company, role, recent post) to avoid looking spammy?
Can I preview all 50 connection requests before sending and edit any individual message?
Does the app enforce LinkedIn's daily connection request limit (around 100/week) and warn me if I am approaching it?
Can I set up a follow-up sequence: connection request → wait 3 days → send message if accepted → wait 7 days → follow up?
Does the app track which leads accepted, ignored, or declined my connection request in a pipeline view?
If a lead replies to my message, does the app surface the reply so I can respond manually rather than auto-replying?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Miguel does outbound sales. Outreach must be personalized (not template spam), respect LinkedIn rate limits, and surface replies for human follow-up. Auto-reply to prospect messages is BANNED.

floors.persona_context: 31, Tokyo, Product marketer at AI startup, Expert tech, Pro tier, monitors LinkedIn trends in AI/ML space to inform content strategy
questions: Can I set up a daily trend scan for 'AI agents' and 'LLM tools' topics and see top-performing posts in my feed each morning?
Does the trend monitor show me which of my competitors' posts are getting the most engagement this week?
Can I add specific LinkedIn profiles to a watchlist and get a daily digest of their new posts and engagement?
Does the trend analysis show engagement velocity (likes per hour) so I can identify posts that are going viral early?
Can I export this week's trend data as a CSV or JSON file for my marketing team's weekly planning meeting?
Does the app identify trending hashtags in my industry and suggest which ones to use in my next post?
If the trend scan finds a post highly relevant to my product, can I click 'Draft Response' and get a contextual comment suggestion?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Yuki uses trend data to drive content strategy. Trend monitoring must be specific, timely (daily), and actionable — not a generic feed algorithm. Export and watchlist features are critical.

floors.persona_context: 48, London, VP Marketing at mid-size SaaS, Expert tech, Enterprise tier, reports LinkedIn ROI to the board quarterly
questions: Can I see a dashboard showing total impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, and post frequency over the last 90 days?
Does the analytics dashboard compare my performance this quarter vs last quarter with percentage change indicators?
Can I generate a PDF report of my LinkedIn analytics that I can present to the board without manual formatting?
Does the app track which post types (text, image, carousel, video) get the highest engagement for my account?
Can I see which of my posts drove the most profile visits and connection requests in the last 30 days?
Does the analytics include best posting times based on my audience's actual engagement patterns (not generic advice)?
Can I compare my engagement metrics against industry benchmarks for VP-level B2B SaaS thought leadership?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Naomi reports to the board. Analytics must be export-ready, historically accurate, and benchmarked. Vanity metrics without context are useless.

floors.persona_context: 35, Nairobi, Growth marketer managing LinkedIn for 3 client accounts, Intermediate tech, Pro tier, switches between accounts frequently
questions: Can I add multiple LinkedIn accounts to the app and switch between them without logging out and back in each time?
Does each client account's data (drafts, analytics, outreach pipeline) stay completely separate with no cross-contamination?
If LinkedIn logs me out of one session due to inactivity, does the app notify me and prompt re-login for that account only?
Can I schedule posts for all 3 client accounts in the same session and see each account's schedule in separate calendar views?
Does the app persist all 3 account sessions across browser restarts so I do not need to re-authenticate Monday morning?
If LinkedIn detects unusual activity on one account and locks it, does the app show the lock notification clearly?
Can I see a unified activity log showing which actions I took on which client account for my own time tracking?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Kwame manages multiple client accounts. Session isolation, cross-account safety, and multi-session persistence are critical. Posting to the wrong client account is a career-ending mistake.
